name: screensharing.connection.group.unresolved-connection
title: Status Screen Sharing Connection Group Unresolved Connections
description: Information about connection groups with member connection references that the system couldn't resolve.

payloadkeys.title: Connection Groups status
payloadkeys.content: A status item that contains an array of unresolved connection groups.

subkeys.content: A status item that contains an unresolved connection group.

subkeys.title: Unique identifier of the connection group.
subkeys.content: The unique `ConnectionGroupUUID` identifier of the connection group.

subkeys.title: Indicates removal of the unresolved connection group.
subkeys.content: If `true`, the system removed the unresolved connection group and only this key and the `identifier` key are present in the status item object.

subkeys.title: Unique identifiers of unresolved connections.
subkeys.content: An array of `ConnectionUUID` values specified in the `Members` key in the group's declaration for the unresolved connections.

subkeys.title: Connection Unique Identifier
subkeys.content: The unique identifier (i.e., ConnectionUUID) of a connection which could not be resolved.
